meta.source: BDO Valkyrie Discord — Awakening Tricks guide
meta.note: The most important skill buffs only; each skill may have more (read the tooltips).

buffs.text: All DP +25 to yourself, and +15% Accuracy Rate to self and nearby allies for 60s. SHIFT+Q in pre-awak, SPACE while blocking in awak.

buffs.name: Breath of Elion
buffs.text: Super Armor to yourself and allies for 3s when used with your lancia.
All Damage Reduction +50% and +100% all-debuff resistance to self and nearby allies for 6s. Limited max resistance against opponent's debuffs.

buffs.name: Celestial Cry
buffs.text: All DP +20 and +12% Accuracy Rate to self and allies for 60s; Magic DP +15 and Movement Speed +20% for 10s. All-DP and Accuracy buff does NOT stack with Heaven's Echo.
All DP +10 and all Special Attack damage +5% to self and allies for 10s. All-DP buff stacks with Heaven's Echo and/or Celestial Cry.
